description:
Move AtomicWriter .bak files to `.automaker/.backups/features/{featureId}/` instead of storing them next to the original feature.json. Currently, if the feature directory is recursively deleted, backups go with it.

Changes needed:
- Update AtomicWriter in libs/utils/src/atomic-writer.ts to support configurable backup directory
- Update FeatureLoader to pass backup directory when writing features
- Ensure .backups/ directory is created on startup
- Update readJsonWithRecovery to check external backup location

Acceptance criteria:
- .bak files stored in separate directory tree
- Recovery still works from external backup location
- Deleting a feature directory doesn't destroy its backups
title: External backup location for feature .bak files
